reason: Authoritative registry for event_type, failure_category, reason_code, and recorder audit shape — must extend with cookie_expired_for_<platform> recorder-side source, REASON_CODE_HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN, and routing rule in _handle_recorder_event.
Existing transient/permanent 4xx classification conventions; new http_403 sub-code must remain non-retryable inside http_4xx_non_retryable category.
Repo coding standards (no premature abstractions, forbidden patterns); recorder gating helper + classifier change must comply.
Structured log line style; any new log emitted by recorder cookie-expired path must follow conventions.
